rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description 'Proc. Hidl. S. Newing & Merton.' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate. The initial 'H' of 'Hidl.' and the 'ing' ending of 'Newing' are clearer than gpt-5-mini's alternatives ('Kidl.' and 'Newn'). Both extractors noted ambiguity, but visual inspection confirmed gemini-flash's interpretation.

rows.description: These 2 last Payments to cease; being transfered to Bursars Book.
